sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8933" key="a)nqupanta/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθυπ-αντάω</orth>, <sense id="n8933.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">meet, reply to objections,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρός τινα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">18.1</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
